    devel/libatomic_ops: Use release archive

    Use release archive instead of USE_GITHUB as suggested
    by "Porters Handbook" ; this also remove the need to use
    USES= autoreconf.
    Also remove libltdl dependency

    PR:             260877
    Reported by:    diizzy
